turns.user: hello hôm nay có tin gì giật gân không bạn
turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là một số tin tức giật gân mới nhất hôm nay:

1. **[Teen Racer Allegedly Takes Knife to Rival Horses](https://www.newser.com/story/390165/after-3-racing-horses-stabbed-a-girl-is-arrested.html)** - Một sự kiện đua ngựa quốc gia ở Las Vegas đã bị chấn động khi ba con ngựa bị phát hiện bị đâm trong chuồng. Cảnh sát cho biết một thiếu niên tham gia đua đã bị bắt giữ vì nghi ngờ đã dùng dao đâm các con vật này.

2. **[A Minecraft Movie Squared will explore 'new biomes, new characters, and new mobs'](https://www.pcgamer.com/movies-tv/a-minecraft-movie-squared-will-explore-new-biomes-new-characters-and-new-mobs-and-confirms-matt-berry-for-a-mystery-role/)** - Bộ phim mới về Minecraft sẽ khám phá các sinh cảnh, nhân vật và quái vật mới, với sự tham gia của Matt Berry trong một vai trò bí ẩn.

3. **[Berkshire Hathaway deal, startups grapple with AI, the cost of the Iran war and more in Morning Squawk](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/01/5-things-to-know-before-the-market-opens.html)** - Nvidia đang gia nhập thị trường PC, làm dấy lên một đợt tăng giá cổ phiếu công nghệ. Tổng thống Donald Trump cho biết ông không vội vàng trong việc đạt được thỏa thuận kết thúc chiến tranh với Iran.

4. **[Silver Pines is a gorgeous 2D Resident Evil-inspired metroidvania](https://www.pcgamer.com/games/horror/silver-pines-is-a-gorgeous-2d-resident-evil-inspired-metroidvania-with-a-dash-of-twin-peaks-where-i-spent-most-of-my-time-methodically-stabbing-monsters-shins/)** - Một trò chơi mới lấy cảm hứng từ Resident Evil, nơi người chơi sẽ phải đối mặt với những con quái vật trong một thế giới 2D đầy bí ẩn.

5. **[Asus announces snazzy edition of ROG Harpe II mouse with '24K gold-plated detailing'](https://www.pcgamer.com/hardware/gaming-mice/asus-has-announced-a-gold-plated-82-g-version-of-its-harpe-ii-mouse-with-a-65k-dpi-but-price-rumours-make-me-think-its-way-out-of-my-budget/)** - Asus đã công bố phiên bản mới của chuột ROG Harpe II với chi tiết mạ vàng 24K và cảm biến 65K DPI.

Bạn có thể xem thêm chi tiết qua các liên kết trên.

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway deal, startups grapple with AI, the cost of the Iran war and more in Morning Squawk - CNBC
items.summary: # Berkshire Hathaway deal, startups grapple with AI, the cost of the Iran war and more in Morning Squawk. *This is CNBC's Morning Squawk newsletter.**Subscribe here**to receive future editions in your inbox.*. There's some breaking news to start the week: Nvidia is getting into the PC market, helping to spark a rally in premarket trading among tech stocks. Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day:. Traders work at the New York Stock Exchange on May 28, 2026. President Donald Trump said over the weekend that he was in "no hurry" to make a deal to end the war with Iran. * Brent oil recorded its largest monthly price decline in six years in May, with investors hoping that the U.S. and Iran may soon ink a deal to end the conflict. * As CNBC's Matt Peterson writes, the war could usher in a new era of economic inequality.

items.title: Teen Racer Allegedly Takes Knife to Rival Horses - Newser
items.summary: Image 1: Newser - Current News - Breaking StoriesImage 2: Newser - Current News - Breaking Stories. *   Image 24 She Was Ticketed for Holding a Phone. A national barrel racing event in Las Vegas was rocked over the weekend after three horses were found stabbed in their stalls, and police say a teenage competitor is to blame. The department's Animal Cruelty Section says the teen, who had access to the barns, allegedly used a knife to repeatedly stab the animals, identified by their owners as Saaul Good, Detail, and Rocket. Saaul Good or "Sully" and owner Hailey Krahenbuhl had just won an event on Friday, per _Sports Illustrated_, which describes both as "superstars." Detail's owner, Arielle Phillips, described the suspect as "a crazy obsessed stalker" who repeatedly visited her horse's stall late Friday "to check if I had left yet." She said surveillance footage showed the teen entering the stall two minutes after Phillips exited just after midnight.
